1.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)

3.gl: compare G5316 (φαίνω), G5346 (φημί)); luminousness (in the widest application, natural or artificial, abstract or concrete, literal or figurative)
3.dv: from an obsolete (to shine or make manifest, especially by rays;

3.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
